summary_raw: Key risks: Middle East conflict (Strait of Hormuz partially closed, oil above $113/bbl Brent), US-Iran tensions causing intraday spikes, US intervention in Venezuela, NATO in Greenland, China overcapacity in EVs/solar/semis. IMF baseline: global growth 3.1%, headline inflation 4.4% in 2026. Adverse scenario: growth 2.5%, inflation 5.4%. Tariff uncertainty ongoing alongside midterm elections and Fed leadership change.
